title: Sex Novel - Cheating Wife 2
description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL with stunning HD visuals and steamy ANIMATIONS.
A devoted wife spirals deeper into temptation, risking her marriage for the passion she can no longer resist.

GAME DESCRIPTIONAlice never wanted to hurt her husband. She never imagined herself crossing that line, always believing she would stay faithful to the vows she and Theo exchanged on their wedding day. But once she gave in to temptation, something inside her changed... and now, she’s no longer sure she wants to stop.

Caught between love and desire, comfort and obsession, Alice finds herself slipping deeper into a dangerous double life. Every secret thrill pulls her further away from the man she loves, while every lie makes it harder to turn back.

Will Theo uncover the truth behind his wife’s betrayal?

Will Alice lose herself completely in the passion she spent years trying to suppress?

Dive into this steamy visual novel and discover what happens when desire burns hotter than loyalty.

FEATURES:   
 
- 250+ renders 
- 16  movies 
- Long story, divided among several mini episodes which you can replay anytime. 
   Play each episode until its end to unlock the next episode. Once unlocked, an episode can be replayed anytime. 
- HD renders and movies 
 

* This story is a sequel to SEX NOVEL – CHEATING WIFE, but can also be enjoyed as a standalone experience.
description_short: An erotic VISUAL NOVEL with stunning HD visuals and steamy ANIMATIONS. A devoted wife spirals deeper into temptation, risking her marriage for the passion she can no longer resist.
